auth.welcomeTitle: Sign in to a world-class code analysis workspace.
auth.welcomeSubtitle: Access clone detection, AST visualization, metrics, AI reporting, grounded follow-up chat, and saved session history from one premium interface.

featureCards.title: Deep code comparison
featureCards.description: Compare pasted snippets, uploaded source files, ZIP projects, or Excel-derived samples in one flow.

featureCards.title: Graph + report workflow
featureCards.description: Review AST structure, metrics, code quality notes, and a polished AI summary in the same session.

featureCards.title: Account-scoped history
featureCards.description: Keep previous analyses organized, searchable, and ready to reopen, rerun, or export.

auth.loginDescription: Enter your account credentials to continue to the comparison workspace.
auth.quote: Cut review time on a 134-student cohort from two days to one afternoon — and the PDF matched our academic integrity template.
auth.createAccountDescription: Sign up to start comparing code, saving history, and exporting reports.
auth.loginCta: Already have an account? Sign in
auth.forgotDescription: Enter your email and we'll send a reset link if the account exists.
auth.resetSentDescription: If that address is registered, a password reset link is on its way.
auth.verifyNoticeDescription: We sent a verification link to your address. Open it to activate your account, then sign in.
auth.verifiedDescription: Your address is confirmed. You can sign in now.
auth.verifyFailedDescription: This verification link is invalid or has expired. Request a new one from the sign-in page.
auth.resetDescription: Enter a new password for your account.
auth.resetDoneDescription: Your password has been changed. You can sign in now.
auth.resetFailedDescription: This reset link is invalid or has expired. Request a new one.
auth.missingToken: This link is missing its token.

errors.weakPassword: Password is too weak. Please use a stronger password.
